title: Cursed Craft
description: Very messed up things like infinitely flowing water, very fast lava, ect.
body:
# Cursed Craft
This is probably in the future going to be the MOST CURSED mod EVER. Current features:

- Infinite Lava (Laggy!)
- Fast Lava
- Infinite Water (Laggy!)
- Fast Water
- Infinite Piston (DO NOT PUSH ENTIRE WORLD IT **WILL** FREEZE)
- Rapid Fire Skeletons (Applies for **any** skeleton like mob)
- Crash on death (3 Types)
- OP Zombies
- Nether water

**All of these mods can be configured through the mod config and are ALL OFF by default**
Adding more soon!

## Planned additions

 - None yet, stay tuned this mod is not and wont be abandoned!

## Contributions

Please contribute a curse to this mod if you really so wish to see the codebase!
